description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for manually building a binary on Windows (x86-64) that triggers on push to the qt6 branch and allows manual dispatch. The workflow should set up a Windows 2022 environment, check out the code, install necessary tools and libraries including Python 3.13, PyInstaller, Qt 6.7.3, NumPy, PyQt6, and other modules from requirements.txt, build Veusz extensions, and create a binary with PyInstaller. Finally, upload the resulting artifact.
